ques: Find a one way economy flight from Pune to New York in Jan. 15th and show me how long it will take for flight transfer.
answer: One-way economy Pune→New York on Jan 15 — top result (€673, Air India + LOT via Delhi & Warsaw) has two transfers: a 4 hr 30 min overnight layover at New Delhi (DEL) and a 5 hr 50 min layover at Warsaw (WAW), for ~10 hr 20 min total transfer time (30 hr 30 min overall trip).
